channel.title: Apple Car on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Apple Car on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Apple's M7 M8 Chips Born
item.description:
Introduction to Apple’s M7 and M8 Processors  

Apple’s latest advancements in processor technology, the M7 and M8, have been making waves in the tech industry. According to Apple’s M6 Era Shortlived , the company is shifting its focus towards AI-centric processors. The M7 and M8 chips are expected to be used in the 16-inch MacBook Pro and Apple Intelligence servers, respectively.

The Role of Apple Car Research  

The development of the M7 and M8 processors has been influenced by Apple’s cancelled Apple Car project. After investing $10 billion over 10 years, Apple decided to repurpose the research to improve artificial intelligence performance in its processors. As Apple Skips M6 Pro Chips suggests, the company is prioritizing AI support over overall speed and power efficiency.
